meta.title: Lynce — Smart Sight for Smart Cities
meta.description: Lynce connects every technology, every company, and every source of city data into a single intelligent ecosystem.

section1.headlineLine2: They need technologies that work together.
section1.body: Today, hundreds of companies build smart technology for cities: traffic, waste, lighting, energy, water, mobility, environmental monitoring. Each one solves its own piece. But every platform lives in isolation, speaking a different language, blind to the rest. The result isn't a smart city. It's a collection of smart systems that don't talk to each other.

ecosystem.title: Everything connects through Lynce
ecosystem.subtitle: An interoperability layer where every technology, every company, and every data source finds its place.

platform.title: From isolated systems to unified intelligence
platform.stepDisconnectedNote: Every vendor, every protocol, every dashboard on its own.
platform.stepLynceNote: A common layer that translates, synchronizes, and connects.
platform.stepUnifiedNote: One single view. One city that thinks as a whole.

ownSolutions.title: Lynce also builds
ownSolutions.body: While we connect the ecosystem, we also develop our own smart city solutions — the first step in proving what's possible when technology works together.
ownSolutions.note: The end goal stays the same: to be the layer that connects everyone else.

ai.name: Artificial Intelligence
ai.description: Models that detect patterns across systems that never used to intersect.

iot.name: IoT
iot.description: Thousands of sensors, one shared real-time data language.

blockchain.name: Blockchain
blockchain.description: Traceability and trust between organizations that don't otherwise know each other.

satellites.name: Satellites
satellites.description: Large-scale territorial vision, integrated with what's happening on the ground.

cloud.name: Cloud
cloud.description: Elastic infrastructure that scales with every new city that connects.

edge.name: Edge Computing
edge.description: Millisecond decisions, made right where they matter: at the edge of the network.

vision.statement: The future of smart cities doesn't depend on more technology. It depends on technology stepping away from competition and starting to collaborate.
vision.subtext: Lynce exists to be that collaboration.
